recommendations.title: The Flight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A young reindeer named Niko dreams about flying like his father, whom he has never met. Despite constant teasing from others, he sneaks out of his home valley to take flying lessons from Julius, a flying squirrel.

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: Me Against You: Mr. S's Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A young couple who makes popular YouTube videos for children sets out to win an award, but an evil mastermind stands in the way of their success.

recommendations.title: Qwerty
recommendations.overview: A grieving young inventor finds solace in repairing an antique typewriter.

recommendations.title: Herbie Fully Loaded
recommendations.overview: Maggie Peyton, the new owner of Number 53 - the free-wheelin' Volkswagen bug with a mind of its own - puts the car through its paces on the road to becoming a NASCAR competitor.

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
recommendations.overview: Desperate to be a big guy, SpongeBob sets out to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following The Flying Dutchman – a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate – on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the deep sea, where no Spong

recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.overview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.

recommendations.title: Super Mario Bros.
recommendations.overview: Mario and Luigi, plumbers from Brooklyn, find themselves in an alternate universe where evolved dinosaurs live in hi-tech squalor. They're the only hope to save our universe from invasion by the dino dictator, Koopa.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Herbie Goes Bananas
recommendations.overview: The adorable little VW helps its owners break up a counterfeiting ring in Mexico.
